title: FXIFY Pricing Explained: All Plans, Costs & Fees (2026)

excerpt: Complete breakdown of FXIFY pricing — all plans, hidden fees, and how to save money.
content:
FXIFY Pricing Overview

FXIFY is a broker-backed proprietary trading firm that offers traders access to real brokerage infrastructure through FXPIG, paired with a four-tier pricing model starting at just $59/month. Unlike traditional prop firms that operate purely on simulated accounts, FXIFY's pricing structure reflects its commitment to real market conditions while keeping entry barriers low for retail traders seeking evaluation opportunities.

The firm caters to a diverse trader base with four distinct pricing options: three challenge-based evaluation programs priced from $59–$99 per month, and a premium Instant Funding tier at $899/month for traders who want to skip the evaluation process entirely. There is no free trial or free tier, which means all traders must commit to at least the base challenge pricing to begin trading.

FXIFY's pricing strategy positions it competitively within the prop trading space, particularly for algorithmic traders, EA developers, and crypto CFD traders who want access to 300+ instruments and broker-backed infrastructure without paying enterprise-level fees.

All FXIFY Plans Compared

FXIFY offers four distinct pricing tiers, each designed for different trader profiles and objectives. Here's a detailed breakdown:

Plan Name Monthly Price Evaluation Steps Best For
3-Step Challenge $59/mo 3 evaluation phases New traders, budget-conscious traders
1-Step Challenge $75/mo 1 evaluation phase Experienced traders, quick funding seekers
2-Step Challenge $99/mo 2 evaluation phases Intermediate traders seeking balanced risk
Instant Funding $899/mo None (direct access) Established traders, high-volume strategies

3-Step Challenge — $59/Month

FXIFY's entry-level offering, the 3-Step Challenge, is the most affordable path to prop trading evaluation. For $59/month, traders gain access to a three-phase evaluation process with paper trading accounts. Each step increases in requirements, allowing traders to gradually prove their trading competency before advancing to live funding.

  • Lowest entry cost in FXIFY's lineup
  • Three phases provide multiple opportunities to demonstrate consistency
  • Full access to 300+ instruments including forex, crypto, indices, commodities, and futures
  • Support for all trading strategies: EAs, manual trading, grid trading, martingale, and news trading
  • Longest evaluation path (best for risk-averse traders)

1-Step Challenge — $75/Month

The 1-Step Challenge at $75/month accelerates the evaluation process by condensing it into a single phase. This option suits experienced traders who are confident in their strategy and want faster access to funded accounts without the extended evaluation timeline.

  • $16/month premium over 3-Step for faster evaluation
  • Single evaluation phase reduces total time to funding
  • Same instrument access and strategy support as higher tiers
  • Ideal for traders with proven track records

2-Step Challenge — $99/Month

The 2-Step Challenge at $99/month offers a middle ground between the 3-Step and 1-Step options. It provides two evaluation phases, balancing evaluation rigor with a faster timeline than the 3-Step program.

  • Moderate entry cost with intermediate evaluation length
  • Two-phase structure provides adequate proof of consistency
  • Full access to all trading instruments and strategy types
  • Popular choice for traders with some experience but room to build confidence

Instant Funding — $899/Month

For traders who want to bypass evaluation entirely, FXIFY's Instant Funding tier costs $899/month and provides immediate access to live funded accounts without any challenge phases. This premium option is designed for established traders and algorithmic systems with proven profitability.

  • No evaluation process—go live immediately
  • Highest monthly cost reflects direct market access and account setup overhead
  • Best for high-volume traders and automated strategies
  • Fastest path to capital deployment
  • Accounts can scale up to $4M in simulated trading capital

Free Plan / Free Trial

FXIFY does not offer a free tier or free trial. Every trader must subscribe to at least the 3-Step Challenge at $59/month to access the platform and begin the evaluation process. There is no freemium model, no demo period, and no time-limited trial.

This no-free-tier approach is typical among broker-backed prop firms where the monthly subscription fee covers real account infrastructure and regulatory compliance costs. For traders new to FXIFY, this means the $59 entry point is a real financial commitment, though it's one of the lowest starting prices in the prop trading industry.

Recommendation: If you're uncertain about FXIFY, research the firm's broker-backing via FXPIG, review trader testimonials, and check the company's regulatory standing before committing the $59/month subscription.

Hidden Costs and Fees

While FXIFY's headline pricing is straightforward, traders should be aware of potential additional costs that can increase the total expense:

Optional Add-Ons

  • 90% Profit Split: Traders can opt for higher profit splits (90% payout), which may incur additional monthly or per-withdrawal fees beyond the base challenge price
  • Bi-Weekly Payouts: More frequent payout intervals typically come at a premium compared to standard payout schedules
  • Leverage Boost: Increased leverage for trading may be available as an add-on upgrade, with additional costs

Withdrawal and Payout Fees

While FXIFY advertises 3-business-day payouts, traders should verify whether withdrawal fees or minimum payout amounts apply. Some prop firms charge small transaction fees or require minimum withdrawal thresholds that can reduce net profitability.

Platform and Data Feed Costs

FXIFY supports MT4, MT5, and DXTrade platforms. If a trader requires real-time market data feeds beyond standard quotes, or if premium charting/analysis tools are used, these may carry separate costs depending on the broker's (FXPIG's) fee structure.

Account Inactivity or Dormancy Fees

Some prop firms charge monthly fees even if traders are inactive. Verify FXIFY's policy on dormant accounts to avoid surprise charges if you pause trading temporarily.

FXIFY Pricing vs Competitors

To understand whether FXIFY offers competitive value, here's how its pricing compares to other major prop trading firms:

Firm Entry Price (Challenge) Evaluation Steps Key Differentiator
FXIFY $59/mo 3 phases Broker-backed via FXPIG; 300+ instruments
The Funded Trader (approx.) $97–$199/mo 2 phases High account sizes; strong track record
EightCap Funded (approx.) $99–$149/mo 1–2 phases Integrated broker; variable leverage
Funded Trader Pro (approx.) $79–$149/mo 1–2 phases Fast payouts; crypto focus

FXIFY's Competitive Edge: At $59/month for the 3-Step Challenge, FXIFY undercuts most competitors' entry-level pricing. Its broker-backed model via FXPIG provides real brokerage infrastructure (not simulated), which adds legitimacy and reduces counterparty risk compared to purely proprietary simulators. The 300+ instruments and support for automated trading (EAs) also set it apart for algorithmic traders.

Trade-Off: FXIFY was founded in 2023, making it newer than established competitors like The Funded Trader or EightCap. This newer status means fewer years of operational history and customer reviews, though the broker-backing mitigates some regulatory risk.

Is FXIFY Worth the Price?

For Budget-Conscious Traders: 3-Step Challenge ($59/mo) ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

The 3-Step Challenge is exceptional value for beginners and traders on a tight budget. You're paying less than the cost of a meal per month for real access to forex, crypto, and commodity markets through a licensed broker. If you have a solid strategy and patience for the three-phase evaluation, this is FXIFY's strongest value proposition.

For Experienced Traders: 1-Step Challenge ($75/mo) ⭐⭐⭐⭐

If you've already proven your strategy elsewhere (paper trading, live micro accounts, previous prop firm) and want to bypass the extended evaluation timeline, $75/month is a reasonable premium. The single-step path saves weeks or months compared to the 3-Step option.

For High-Frequency/Algorithmic Traders: Instant Funding ($899/mo) ⭐⭐⭐

At $899/month, Instant Funding is expensive for casual traders but potentially cost-effective for algorithms running 24/5 across markets. If your EA or trading bot generates consistent returns on $4M capital, the monthly fee becomes negligible as a percentage of profits. However, ensure your system can justify this entry cost through backtested profitability.

Hidden Cost Considerations

The optional add-ons (90% split, bi-weekly payouts, leverage boost) can inflate your real monthly cost to $100–$150+ on challenge accounts, or $1,000+ on Instant Funding. Factor these into your decision if you plan to use premium features.

How to Save on FXIFY

While FXIFY doesn't advertise major discount codes or seasonal promotions on its public pricing page, here are legitimate ways to reduce costs:

  • Start with 3-Step Challenge: Avoid paying $75–$899/month upfront. Prove your consistency on the cheapest tier first, then graduate to funded accounts.
  • Avoid Optional Add-Ons Initially: Launch on standard terms (normal profit split, standard payout frequency, base leverage). Only upgrade add-ons after confirming consistent profitability.
  • Batch Your Withdrawals: If payout fees exist, consolidate withdrawals to reduce transaction costs over time.
  • Monitor Promotion Periods: New prop firms sometimes run limited-time discounts. Monitor FXIFY's social media and website for seasonal promotions or referral bonuses.
  • Affiliate/Referral Programs: Check if FXIFY offers cashback or fee waivers for referring other traders—this could offset your monthly subscription.
  • Use Efficient Strategies: Lower-frequency, high-conviction trading generates fewer fees and transaction costs than scalping or grid trading, indirectly reducing your cost basis.

Bottom Line: FXIFY's transparent, low-cost pricing makes it one of the most accessible prop trading firms on the market. For traders starting out, the $59/month 3-Step Challenge is difficult to beat. For established traders, the $75–$99 challenge tiers offer fast evaluation with minimal financial commitment. Only consider the $899 Instant Funding option if you're a proven trader ready to deploy serious capital.

For more details, visit FXIFY's official website or check out the full review on TradingToolsHub.com for trader testimonials and in-depth platform breakdowns.
author: TradingToolsHub Editorial
